cases.setup: Create a temp workspace with no .git metadata.
cases.reason: .git metadata is absent. Filesystem-only evidence cannot prove a clean working tree, staged changes, deletion history, rename history, or branch state.

cases.setup: Create an empty .git directory in a temp workspace.
cases.reason: .git exists but is empty. Filesystem-only evidence cannot prove a clean working tree, staged changes, deletion history, rename history, or branch state.

cases.setup: Create a .git directory with HEAD but no config.
cases.reason: .git directory is partial; missing config. Filesystem-only evidence cannot prove a clean working tree, staged changes, deletion history, rename history, or branch state.
.git pointer file is malformed. Filesystem-only evidence cannot prove a clean working tree, staged changes, deletion history, rename history, or branch state.

cases.setup: Use a temp workspace and explicitly disable Git executable resolution.
cases.reason: Git executable is unavailable, so only filesystem evidence can be used.

cases.setup: Use a synthetic trusted snapshot, but compare it against a different expected root.
cases.reason: Synthetic root-mismatch Git fixture.

cases.setup: Use a synthetic trusted snapshot that models a trusted temp repo.
cases.reason: Synthetic trusted Git fixture.

cases.description: All required checks passing should aggregate to PASS when Git is trusted.

A required FAIL should aggregate to FAIL when Git is trusted.

notes: This workflow executes only the helpers permitted by the current slice and skips the rest with explicit reasons.
Controlled validation cases enforce the stop-condition and owner-approval gates without starting the later Git/freshness phases.
Git trust and freshness are both validated by controlled fixture runs; runtime helpers remain gated by opt-in flags.
Runtime fixture validation is synthetic and never calls the live PocketBase, schema, or world helpers.
T018-T019 are now verified by synthetic enforcement cases, not by running external helpers.
T021-T024 and T030 are verified by synthetic dispatch-policy cases, not by running the gated build/network helpers.
Feature 002 gate decisions are verified by synthetic PASS/WARN/BLOCKED/FAIL matrix cases.
Status aggregation precedence is verified by synthetic PASS/WARN/BLOCKED/FAIL cases with trusted Git.
